info.title: Stack Exchange API
info.description: The Stack Exchange API v2.3 provides programmatic access to all Stack Exchange network sites (Stack Overflow, Server Fault, Super User, etc.). Supports reading questions, answers, users, tags, search, and write operations with OAuth authentication.

get.description: Gets all questions on the site.

parameters.name: site
parameters.description: Site domain or short name (e.g., stackoverflow)

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Application key for higher request quotas
